summary: mypy warns about invalid types for the `json` argument to `requests.post` when using intermediate dictionary variables.
expected_behavior: The `json` argument should not produce invalid-type warnings; the issue states that these warnings did not occur when using `types-requests`.
actual_behavior: mypy reports `Argument "json" to "post" has incompatible type "dict[str, Collection[str]]"; expected "JsonType"` and `Argument "json" to "post" has incompatible type "dict[str, object]"; expected "JsonType"`.
missing_info: The exact mypy command or configuration used
